description: Mobile-first falling-block stacking puzzle. 10×20 canvas grid; 4-cell pieces fall with level-scaled gravity; player rotates + slides into place; complete rows clear and score 100/300/500/800 × level. 7-bag random distribution for fair piece variety. Ghost-piece preview shows where the active piece will land. Wall-kick rotation. Bottom on-screen control pad (←/rotate/→/↓/⬇⬇) for touch + arrow-key fallback for desktop. localStorage persists best score. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.tetris-board verbatim.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.tetris. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of GridBoard + TetrisBoard (verbatim, marker present), (2) canvas-based rendering with computed cell-size that fits the viewport (responsive on resize), (3) ghost-piece preview at 25% opacity showing landing position, (4) standard 7-bag random distribution, (5) wall-kick rotation (try base then ±1, ±2 col offsets), (6) hard drop (Space / ⬇⬇ button) with bonus scoring (drop_distance × 2), (7) level-scaled gravity (1000ms × 0.85^(level-1), floor 60ms), (8) bottom on-screen control pad (5 buttons, ≥56px each — exceeds mob-002), (9) keyboard arrow-key + space parity for desktop, (10) side-panel with Score/Lines/Level/Next-piece-preview, (11) end-game overlay with stats + new-best announcement.

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the falling-block stacking puzzle genre gap. Composes recipe.tetris's required Lego (entities.tetris-board, internal Lego id retained). Mobile-first portrait full-bleed with all mobile-frontend wisdom rules applied. AntiKeywords for match-3 / 2048 / block-blast / 1010 disambiguate from neighboring tile-puzzle genres.
